title: Improved Nether Star
description: Adds crafting recipes for uncraftable items using the Nether Star.
body:
This Data Pack adds new crafting recipes using the Nether Star.

### Items included:
  - Bottle o' Enchanting
  - Budding Amethyst
  - Dragon Egg
  - Elytra
  - Enchanted Golden Apple
  - End Portal Frame
  - Name Tag
  - Reinforced Deepslate
  - Sculk Catalyst
  - Totem of Undying
  - Trident

Check the gallery or the data pack's page on [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/User:LiteraGame/Projects/Packs_and_textures/Improved_Nether_Star#Crafting_recipes) to see the crafting recipes for each item.

This pack is also available to download as an _Bedrock Edition_ add-on on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/improved-nether-star).
